extra.message:
Confirmed XXE / unsafe XML parsing vulnerability in the root Flask application.

Relevant code paths:
- app.py:152-160 defines web endpoint @app.route('/xml', methods=['POST', 'GET']). Untrusted input is read from request.form['xml'] at app.py:156.
- app.py:157 constructs lxml parser as etree.XMLParser(no_network=False, dtd_validation=True). This explicitly permits network access during parsing and enables DTD processing/validation.
- app.py:159 parses attacker-controlled XML with etree.fromstri

cwe: CWE-287: Unsafe XML parsing leading to server-side file/network access

extra.message:
Confirmed vulnerability: server-side template injection and reflected XSS in the intentionally vulnerable greeting feature. Relevant code: - app.py:185-205 defines POST/GET /sayhi. - app.py:189 reads untrusted input from request.form['name'] and interpolates it directly into an HTML fragment: name = '
Hello %s!

' % (request.form['name']) - app.py:191-204 then interpolates that fragment into the full template source with Python string formatting at line 204. - app.py:205 renders the at

cwe: CWE-79: Server-side template injection / cross-site scripting in rendered user content

extra.message:

Hello %s!

' % (request.form['name']) - app.py:191-204 then interpolates that fragment into the full template source with Python string formatting at line 204. - app.py:205 renders the at

cwe: CWE-79: Server-side template injection / cross-site scripting in rendered user content

extra.message:
Confirmed multiple code/command injection vulnerabilities in the root Flask app, consistent with the component’s intentionally vulnerable training purpose but still valid security findings for this audit because they are remotely reachable from unauthenticated HTTP endpoints and permit unintended server-side code execution.

Findings:
1) Python code execution via eval on untrusted form input
- File: app.py:111-120
- Endpoint: POST /evaluate
- Untrusted input: request.form['expression'] at app.py

cwe: CWE-78: Code/command injection from untrusted web input
